prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约13984→12411→10779→10130→32350名。2021–2024年呈持续前移趋势（从约13984名升至约10130名），但2025年因高考模式由文理分科改为"3+1+2"新高考，批次从本科一批调整为本科批B段，位次体系发生结构性变化，物理类最低位次大幅后移至约32350名，2025年基准位次约32350名；该校在云南省理科组招生计划：2021年81人→2022年89人→2023年93人→2024年95人→2025年物理类98人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年物理类计划113人，较2025年增加15人（扩招约15.3%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第89名，近年排名稳定在88–92名区间，属中游偏上211，综合实力稳健；该校在2026年声誉监测中未出现显著负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第83位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未见明显报考关注度异常升温或降温信号；历史投档异常记录中亦未出现该校断档或暴跌情况，声誉整体平稳；长安大学在第五轮学科评估中，交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，在公路交通、道路桥梁等领域具有显著行业影响力，相关专业对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校理科组主要招生专业涉及土木建筑类（社会热度明显劝退）、机械类（分化观望）、计算机类（推荐）、电子信息/通信类（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等。热门工科专业热度持续走高，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；土木建筑类劝退则可能拉低部分专业录取位次。云南省2026年普通高考总人数约37.79万人，较2025年（约28.57万人）大幅增长约32.3%，按近年物理类占比约58%估算，2026年物理类考生约21.9万人，较2025年增长约26.5%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。；长安大学校本部位于陕西省西安市，属西部高校，在云南省招生计划占该校全国总招生比例较小（2025年约2.2%），地域偏好因素对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年物理类基准位次约32350名、2026年大幅扩招约15.3%（缓解竞争）、云南省物理类考生增长约26.5%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉平稳、热门工科专业热度等因素，扩招与考生增长相互对冲，但考生增幅大于扩招幅度，预计竞争略有加剧。，考虑考生规模大幅增长带来的竞争压力，预测2026年物理类最低位次约35521名，区间35021–36021名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 13984 → 12411 → 10779 → 10130 → 32350. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (from about 13984 to 10130), but in 2025, due to the change from the arts/science division to the "3+1+2" new college entrance examination model, the batch was adjusted from the first batch of undergraduate to the B section of the undergraduate batch, causing a structural change in the ranking system. The minimum ranking for the physics category significantly dropped to about 32350, with the 2025 baseline ranking at approximately 32350. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Yunnan Province: 2021: 81 students → 2022: 89 → 2023: 93 → 2024: 95 → 2025: 98 for the physics category, showing a gradual small expansion trend. In 2026, the physics category plan is 113 students, an increase of 15 students (about 15.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 89th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 88–92 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with solid overall strength. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion incidents were detected; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as "average," indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms without obvious abnormal increases or decreases in application attention. Historical admission anomaly records also show no cases of gaps or sharp drops for this university, indicating overall stable reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chang'an University's Transportation Engineering was rated A-, its only A- or above discipline, giving it significant industry influence in fields such as highway transportation and road and bridge engineering, making related majors attractive to some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's main enrollment majors in the science group include civil and architectural categories (socially discouraged), mechanical categories (divided and wait-and-see), computer categories (recommended), electronic information/communication categories (highly recommended), and electrical engineering and automation (highly recommended). The popularity of hot engineering majors continues to rise, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates; the discouragement of civil and architectural categories may lower the admission rankings for some majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (about 285,700). Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 58%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 219,000, an increase of about 26.5% from 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Chang'an University's main campus is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a western university, and its enrollment plan in Yunnan Province accounts for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment (about 2.2% in 2025), so regional preference factors have limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 physics category baseline ranking of about 32350, the significant 2026 expansion of about 15.3% (alleviating competition), the increase in Yunnan physics category candidates by about 26.5% (intensifying competition), stable university reputation, and the popularity of hot engineering majors, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other, but the candidate growth rate exceeds the expansion rate, so competition is expected to slightly intensify. Taking into account the competitive pressure from the significant increase in candidate numbers, the predicted 2026 physics category minimum ranking is about 35521, with a range of 35021–36021.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for 2026 is about 35521, with a range of 35021–36021. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Traffic Engineering, Road and Bridge Engineering, etc., which are the university's signature majors with high cost performance), use Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as targets for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Civil, Materials, Geology, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (below 35021) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (above 36021) are advised to primarily rely on Tier 3 majors for safety, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 2288 → 2364 → 2255 → 4717 → 4443. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the 2200–2400 range. In 2024, due to the reform of the college entrance examination model (from arts/science division to "3+1+2"), the ranking system was adjusted, and the liberal arts ranking significantly shifted back to about 4717. In 2025, the history category ranking was about 4443, stabilizing in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Yunnan Province: 2021: 9 students → 2022: 8 students → 2023: 6 students → 2024: 6 students → 2025: 12 students for history category, doubling in 2025. The 2026 history category plan is 11 students, a decrease of 1 student (about 8.3% reduction) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 89th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with strengths in engineering. The liberal arts majors are relatively small in scale but rely on the overall platform of the university. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion was observed. Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, with a rating of "average" and stable attention. No record of enrollment gaps, reputation signal is neutral. The liberal arts majors offered by Chang'an University (Law, English, Japanese, Administrative Management, Business Administration, Ideological and Political Education) have low correlation with the university's A- discipline (Transportation Engineering). Liberal arts majors lack direct support from A-class disciplines, but majors like Law and Business Administration still have certain competitiveness relying on the university's 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the liberal arts group enrollment majors, Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Foreign Languages are generally wait-and-see, and Business Administration is divided with wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Province general college entrance examination is about 377,900, a significant increase from 2025. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 40%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 151,000, an increase of about 34.3% from 2025 (about 112,400), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western university. Its enrollment plan for liberal arts in Yunnan Province is relatively small, and regional preference has limited impact on liberal arts applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 history category baseline ranking of about 4443, a slight enrollment reduction of about 8.3% in 2026 (intensifying competition), a growth of about 34.3% in Yunnan history category candidates (significantly intensifying competition), stable university reputation, and relatively high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law, the competitive pressure has increased significantly. Taking into account the dual pressure of a large increase in candidate numbers and enrollment reduction, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 history category is about 4251, with a range of 3751–4751.
